Package generation.characters

package generation.characters
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    generation
     
    generation.map
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Character
    Abstract base class for all characters in the game (player and enemies).
    Enemy
    Represents a basic enemy (Zombie) that moves randomly each turn.
    Ghost
    Represents a Ghost enemy that moves in a straight line and ignores obstacles.
    Hunter
    Represents a Hunter enemy that actively pursues the player using BFS pathfinding.
    Player
    Represents a player in the game with score, lives, and position.
